event: presented to emergency department with abdominal pain
abdominal wall defect allowed to granulate
skin incisions made 2 cm lateral to defective area
two rectangular tissue expanders placed in subcutaneous pockets
tissue expanders inflated with 200 mL saline
expanders gradually inflated to total volume of 2,350 mL each over four months
fascial defect too large to close primarily
expanded skin flaps advanced toward midline
no signs of mesh infection during follow-up
